allowed_differences: Repository-owned examples, CI, release instructions, and public landing documentation live outside the projected package directory.
Stack-owned systemd, authenticated loopback HTTP, bearer credential, and /srv launch profiles are not projected.
The downstream package manifest is generated by the owner-side exporter.

authority_boundary.mcp_role: local read-only access plane over .aoa session evidence, search, atlas, and diagnostics
authority_boundary.mutation_posture: no write, no repair, no reindex, no relabel, no distillation, no promotion
authority_boundary.service_owner: abyss-stack owns the runnable MCP package only
source_hierarchy: raw transcript JSONL and raw source metadata
session manifest and raw block ledger
session.index.json, registry, atlas maps, search index, diagnostics
stop_lines: Do not replace raw transcript evidence with MCP summaries.
Do not write, repair, reindex, relabel, export, distill, or promote session memory from this MCP.
Do not treat generated atlas/search/readiness output as reviewed truth.
Do not expose bulk raw transcript payloads by default.
Do not bind HTTP beyond loopback or bypass the source-owned MCP lifecycle decision.
stronger_owners: .aoa raw transcript archive and generated indexes
.aoa route-signal classifier, maps, search provider status, and diagnostics
owning source repositories for source truth

root_discovery.symlink_posture: resolve roots before marker validation and report the resolved path
